reforms.description: The federal Government has confirmed its intention of intervening actively in support of regional development and fostering growth sectors by establishing an Office of Industrial and Regional Benefits to coordinate industrial development aspects of Federal legislation and policies. Additionally, an Industrial Opportunities Program is being created to coordinate support for industrial restructuring, innovation, and all phases of product development.
reforms.component_name: Office of Industrial and Regional Benefits
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance industrial development and innovation, which are expected to contribute positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The federal Government has confirmed its intention and established the Office of Industrial and Regional Benefits.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a dedicated office and program for industrial and regional benefits represents a significant structural change in government policy towards innovation and regional development.
reforms.source_quote: The federal Government has confirmed its intention of intervening actively in support of regional development and of fostering growth sectors while at the same time strengthening the operation of markets and the adjustment process.
